case_title: MAYCO GUERRA VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUERRA, MAYCO AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT FILED A GOVERNMENT CLAIM AGAINST THE DEFENDANT, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT BY COURT CALL. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOE ABAD--ADJUSTER FOR CCSF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-15-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUERRA, MAYCO
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY GUERRA, MAYCO AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) IS GRANTED.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
